channel.title: Jobs on The Tradewinds Brief
channel.description: Recent content in Jobs on The Tradewinds Brief

item.title: Auntie Cheryl Speaks — Trinidad, Monday April 6, 2026
item.description: Auntie Cheryl, calling from Chaguanas, is overjoyed about Kamla and has prepared cook-up to celebrate.

item.title: 🎯 Bounty Board: Community Notices - January 24, 2026
item.description: Community notices, events, and announcements from across Guyana. Jobs, events, lost & found, and more!
